steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Biblioboard' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  Book 'bookInfo' is opened on book details screen
